title: Entity Distance Hud
description: A simple mod for the Fabric Loader, that displays the distance between you and the nearest living entity as a NEW HUD element.
body:
⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️ This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
**Mod Description** **Entity Distance HUD**, is a client-sided only Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that allows you to see the distance between you and the nearest entity that is within **16** blocks away, as a new HUD element, on the right side of the hot-bar. The information included (about nearest entity) in the display is:
**Distance** (In Blocks) **Current Health** **Name**
There is also a command to toggle the mod **ON**/**OFF**: **/toggleentitydistancedisplay**. For a visual of this mod, please visit this mod's **[Gallery Tab](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/entity-distance-hud/gallery)**.
**Why Download?** Knowing what entities that are around you can be a **good thing to know**, especially when you are caving; **thus you can be more aware about the dangerous creatures**.
**Donation** If you like my work, and would like support me, then please consider to donate **[here](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/EdwardKhrabrov)** (or with another link on the side bar, under "Links").
